docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARK ONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAYEDOMER HADI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONG, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HADI, SAYEDOMER $2,192.42 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,317.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 -
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ONG, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT HADI, SAYEDOMER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SUBPOENA ISSUED TO WALGREEN, ATTENTION MANAGER 2120 POLK STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA. 94109
